gleam 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference

Run Soil Carbon Stock Change Calculation (Internal)

Source: R/run_soil_carbon.R
run_soil_carbon.Rd

Executes the soil organic carbon (SOC) stock change pipeline. Applies the core soil carbon model row-by-row to an input dataset using parameter tables for management factors, soil type references, and land-use change factors.

run_soil_carbon(data, management_params, soil_type_params, luc_factors)

Arguments

data

Data.table. Input dataset containing columns: area, climate_zone, soil_carbon_reference (optional), soil_type, management_start, management_end.

management_params

Data.table. Management factors by climate zone and management type. Must have columns: climate_zone, management_type, V1.

soil_type_params

Data.table. SOC reference values by climate zone and soil type. Must have columns: climate_zone, soil_type, V1.

luc_factors

Data.table. Land-use change factors by climate zone. Must have columns: climate_zone, V1.

Value

Data.table. The input data with three new columns:

SOC1

SOC stock at start (t C total).

SOC2

SOC stock at end (t C total).

dSOC

Annual SOC change (t C/year total).

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
input <- data.table::fread(
  system.file("extdata/soc_input_data.csv", package = "gleam")
)
data_out <- run_soil_carbon(
  data = input,
  management_params = data.table::fread(system.file(
    "extdata/SoilCarbon_parameters/soc_factor_management.csv",
    package = "gleam")),
  soil_type_params = data.table::fread(system.file(
    "extdata/SoilCarbon_parameters/soc_socref_soiltype.csv",
    package = "gleam")),
  luc_factors = data.table::fread(system.file(
    "extdata/SoilCarbon_parameters/soc_luc_factor.csv",
    package = "gleam"))
)
} # }

Contents

Developed by Ahmed Jou, Yassine Elaouni, Dominik Wisser, Lydia Lanzoni, Giuseppe Tempio, Federal Ministry of Agriculture, Food and Regional Identity of Germany BMELH.
